evals.prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for a Node.js API with staging and production environments
assertions: includes lint, test, build, and deploy stages
deploys to staging on PR merge, production on release

evals.prompt: Design a monitoring strategy for our microservices architecture
assertions: monitors the four golden signals (latency, traffic, errors, saturation)
recommends alerting on symptoms not causes
includes dashboard and runbook references for each alert
